componentDescription: Card is a generic container component with consistent padding, border, border-radius, and optional shadow. Use it to group related content into a visually distinct section — dashboard widgets, list item details, form sections, and feature highlight blocks.
features: Consistent padding and border-radius matching the design system
Clickable card variant with hover state
Flexible children slot for any content layout
compositionPattern: Card is a simple wrapper — place any content as children. For common patterns, combine with a header section (title + action), a body section, and an optional footer.

usageExamples.title: Dashboard metric card
usageExamples.description: Card wrapping a KPI metric display.
usageExamples.code:
Total Revenue

$124,500

↑ 12% from last month

usageExamples.title: Clickable resource card
usageExamples.description: Card that navigates to a detail page when clicked.
usageExamples.code:
navigate(`/projects/${project.id}`)} style={{ cursor: 'pointer' }}>

{project.name}

{project.description}

children.llmContext: Required. Any React content to render inside the card. Card only provides the visual container — structure the internal layout yourself using flexbox, grid, or other layout primitives.
children.propDescription: Required. Content to render inside the card
